title: Filter Board - Dates is Between X & Y
excerpt: I’d like to filter my boards using a date field. I would like to see only contacts with a date between 2 specific dates. I only seem to have ‘this month’, ‘last month’ etc, but I can’t see anywhere I can be specific and …

posts.author: Jack (Jack Stirk)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to filter my boards using a date field. I would like to see only contacts with a date between 2 specific dates. I only seem to have ‘this month’, ‘last month’ etc, but I can’t see anywhere I can be specific and filter by a certain month/ week E.g. Created date was in October 2018. Is this possible or could a ‘between dates x & y’ option be added to filters?

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Jack

Thank you for your request!

We’ll pass this along to our product team for consideration as I do see its value.

Thanks again and keep the feedback coming

posts.author: Stefan (SJN)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 for this request; it is VERY useful to have this, perhaps even required, in order to be able to use it for detailed planning/scheduling.

posts.author: booey811 (Gabriel Barr)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey team! We’d also love to see something like this, sorry we’re so late to the party!

Has there been any progress on this or are we still mulling it over?

posts.author: llevito (Leslie Levito)
posts.cookedHtml:
+1 for the ability to be able to see time tracked for specific dates.

Also if you see a time widget with a time total, is there a way to see the specific tasks and times for the total?

posts.author: lindsay-monday.com (Lindsay Mayrose)
posts.cookedHtml:
Great news! @Jack @Stefan @booey811 @llevito

We do now have the ability to filter between dates using our Advanced Filters: The Board Filters

image718×296 18.2 KB

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
